case_title: WILLIAM JORDAN VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2010 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00 WAIVED) SERVED JAN-12-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY JORDAN, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JORDAN, WILLIAM ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JORDAN, WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH A CLAIM AGAINST THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
